results.rendered_html:
brahmiṣṭha a. Thoroughly proficient in the Vedas, very learned or pious; brahmiṣṭhamādhāya nije'dhikāre brahmiṣṭhameva svatanuprasūtaṃ  R. 18. 28. 
— ṣṭhā An epithet of Durgā.
